walledGarden_call_sites.role: call site — closure passed to subscribeDirectMessageNotifications
call site — historical kind-1059 rumor gate

similar_features.welcome_auto_accept_flow: subscribeToWelcomes (welcomeSubscription.ts:63-179): receives kind-1059, unwraps via two-layer NIP-44 decryption, calls marmotClient.joinGroupFromWelcome({ welcomeRumor }) immediately (line 134) with no user gate. On success: marks eventId in lp_processedGiftWraps, builds Group object from MLS state, saves via saveGroup(), fires onGroupJoined callback.

localstorage_patterns.storage_keys_registry: app/src/types/index.ts:127-140 — STORAGE_KEYS const. All keys cleared by storage.ts:resetAllData. New keys (lp_knownPeers_v1, lp_pendingInvitations_v1, lp_knownPeersMigrated_v2, lp_knownPeersMigrationNoticeAck_v1) MUST be added here.
localstorage_patterns.rw_helpers: app/src/lib/storage.ts:38-56 — readItem/writeItem with JSON.parse/stringify + silent-fail try/catch + isStorageAvailable guard. Pure modules (knownPeers.ts, pendingInvitations.ts) should replicate this pattern.
localstorage_patterns.raw_access_pattern: welcomeSubscription.ts uses localStorage.getItem/setItem directly with inline try/catch for lp_processedGiftWraps — acceptable for pure lib modules.
localstorage_patterns.reset_coverage: Object.values(STORAGE_KEYS) is iterated in resetAllData — new keys added to STORAGE_KEYS are automatically cleared on account reset.

marmot_context_group_effects.purge_sweep: lines 495-530 — runs on ready/groups.length/pubkeyHex change. Reads groupsRef.current (not closure-captured groups). getWhitelist closure at line 500: `() => ({ groups: groupsRef.current, ownPubkeyHex: pubkeyHex })`. knownPeers must be added to this closure.
marmot_context_group_effects.members_changed_hook: subscribeToGroupMessages onMembersChanged callback (lines 843-863) bumps groupDataVersion and re-persists memberPubkeys — authoritative membership update. knownPeers maintenance should live here too.
marmot_context_group_effects.note: groupDataVersion intentionally excluded from purge-sweep deps to avoid IDB lock contention.

similar_features.whitelist_args_pattern: WhitelistArgs = { groups: ReadonlyArray<Group>; ownPubkeyHex: string | null | undefined }. Must gain knownPeers: ReadonlySet<string> field. All purge callers get the extended set through the same getWhitelist() closure.

invite_ui_patterns.PendingRequestsSection: app/src/components/groups/PendingRequestsSection.tsx — closest structural match. List of approve/deny rows driven by context state. Returns null when empty. Each row shows truncated npub.
invite_ui_patterns.JoinRequestCard: app/src/components/groups/JoinRequestCard.tsx — single-action confirm pattern. Good for accept/decline loading states with Chakra UI Alert/Button/VStack.
invite_ui_patterns.note: PendingInvitations.tsx should mirror PendingRequestsSection structure — renders above the joined-groups list, returns null when empty.

architecture.module_boundaries: lib/ files must NEVER import from context/ (zero hits in grep). No barrel exports under lib/ or components/. Single types barrel: app/src/types/index.ts. lib/ is pure TS — no hooks, no JSX. knownPeers.ts and pendingInvitations.ts must follow this: pure TS, no React, no idb-keyval (per AC-STRUCT-1 and AC-STRUCT-3).

group_type.note: memberPubkeys authoritative source is getGroupMembers(mlsGroup.state). No pending/invitee fields.

architecture.marmot_context_exports: useMarmot() exposes: ready, unsupported, groups, reloadGroups, createGroup, inviteByNpub, leaveGroup, getClient, groupDataVersion, pendingRequests, loadPendingRequestsForGroup, approveJoinRequest, denyJoinRequest, cancelPendingInvitation. New epic adds: acceptPendingInvitation, declinePendingInvitation (from welcomeSubscription.ts), knownPeers or useKnownPeers hook.
architecture.groups_page_structure: app/pages/groups.tsx dispatches on query params: ?join=... → JoinRequestCard, ?id=... → GroupDetailView, else → list view. List view order: OfflineBanner, BackupReminderBanner, heading block, HTTPS alert, loading, empty-state, groups VStack. PendingInvitations should mount above the groups list, logically after the heading block. All content inside data-testid='groups-page' Box.
architecture.nav_badge_pattern: NotificationBell.tsx — mounted in Layout.tsx at lines 127 (desktop) and 149 (mobile). Badge at top-level when totalUnread > 0. Popover lists: group messages (brand.500), DM threads (brand.500), join requests (orange.500). New pending-invitations count should follow joinRequestGroups pattern (lines 239-289). The nav bar itself has no per-item badge slots.
architecture.live_state_pattern: unreadStore.ts — module-level singleton: mutable state + Set<() => void> listeners. Mutations call emit(); React binds via useSyncExternalStore. This is the right model for pending-invitation counts. MarmotContext version counters (chatVersion, etc.) are for IDB-backed async reads.
architecture.marmot_client_welcome_api: marmotClient.joinGroupFromWelcome({ welcomeRumor }) at welcomeSubscription.ts:134. Takes plain Nostr event (kind 444 rumor, unwrapped). Returns { group: MarmotGroup }. The spec calls this 'client.acceptWelcome' — actual API is joinGroupFromWelcome. architect must use the real API name.

testing.unit_test_framework: Vitest, 'npx vitest run' via 'make test-unit'. Include: 'tests/unit/**/*.test.ts'. Node environment (no jsdom). Path alias '@' → app root.
testing.localstorage_mock_pattern: Object.defineProperty(globalThis, 'localStorage', { value: inMemoryMock }). Clear in beforeEach. See contacts.test.ts:12-24.
testing.walledGarden_test_structure: 3 describe blocks, 16 cases total. Pure synchronous, no mocks. Inline Group fixtures with 64-hex pubkeys. Extension adds cases for knownPeers disjunction.
testing.welcomeSubscription_test_location: app/tests/unit/marmot/welcomeSubscription.test.ts — already exists (388 lines). Uses vi.mock() for idb-keyval, NDK, epochResolver. Dynamic import after mocks.
testing.e2e_framework: Playwright with strfry relay. make test-e2e-groups for relay suite. testMatch: 'groups-*.spec.ts' and 'dm-*.spec.ts' for relay tests.
testing.CRITICAL_e2e_naming: New e2e specs MUST use 'groups-' prefix to match testMatch and run with relay: groups-pull-only-invitation-accept.spec.ts, groups-pull-only-invitation-decline.spec.ts, groups-ever-known-survives-leave.spec.ts, groups-migration-backfill.spec.ts. The spec names in AC-TEST-5 through AC-TEST-8 lack this prefix — implementation must rename them.
testing.idb_seeding_pattern: writeIdbRecord(page, dbName, storeName, key, value) helper in app/tests/e2e/helpers/idb-record.ts. Used AFTER page.goto('/') + waitForLoadState('networkidle'). IDB keys for messages: 'quizzl:messages:dm:<peerHexLowercase>' in 'keyval-store' database.
testing.clearAppState_update: clearAppState() in app/tests/e2e/helpers/clear-state.ts clears lp_* localStorage keys (covers new lp_knownPeers_v1, lp_pendingInvitations_v1). IDB databases list must NOT need updating since knownPeers/pendingInvitations use localStorage, not IDB.
testing.groups_contacts_change: After Alice invites Bob (invite-submit-btn, invite-success visible), Bob must see pending invitation and click Accept before groups list shows the group. The test at line 63-66 needs: navigate to /groups/, find pending invitation row for Alice, click Accept button, THEN expect group card visible.

existing_walled_garden_e2e.dm_publish_bridge: window.__quizzlPublishDm — app-side publish bridge, NOT raw WebSocket. Required per CLAUDE.md e2e rule.
existing_walled_garden_e2e.all_three_specs_keep: dm-walled-garden-stranger-blocked, group-member-allowed, retroactive-purge — all kept unchanged per DD-12.

critical_flags: New e2e spec filenames need 'groups-' prefix for relay testMatch — AC-TEST-5 through AC-TEST-8 names are WRONG as written in spec
marmotClient.joinGroupFromWelcome is the real API name (spec says 'client.acceptWelcome' — this is the intent, not the actual method)
STORAGE_KEYS in app/src/types/index.ts must be updated with all 4 new lp_ keys for resetAllData coverage
WhitelistArgs in walledGarden.ts must gain knownPeers field and getWhitelist closure in MarmotContext must return it
AC-TEST-9 clarified by user: groups-contacts.spec.ts WILL be modified to add Bob's Accept click
